languages.text: "Когда испытания в этом темном секторе завершатся, а ваше судно вернется домой, я отыщу чартиста, готового взять на борт восставшего мертвеца, все еще мечтающего о звездах, и отправиться в неизвестность. Я слишком долго покрывался пылью в бездействии. Пришло время завоевать для династии новые миры... и оставить протекторат его законно{mf|му|й} владел{mf|ьцу|ице}".

"Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and set out toward the unknown. I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."
languages.original_text: "Когда испытания в этом темном секторе завершатся, а ваше судно вернется домой, я отыщу чартиста, готового взять на борт восставшего мертвеца, все еще мечтающего о звездах, и отправиться в неизвестность. Я слишком долго покрывался пылью в бездействии. Пришло время завоевать для династии новые миры... и оставить протекторат его законно{mf|му|й} владел{mf|ьцу|ице}".

traits.locale_text: "Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and to set out toward the unknown. I spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

I spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

languages.text: "Sobald unser Martyrium in diesem dunklen Sektor vorbei ist und Euer Schiff nach Hause zurückkehrt, werde ich einen Chartisten finden, der bereit ist, einen vormals toten Mann an Bord zu nehmen, der immer noch von den Sternen träumt, um in das Unbekannte aufzubrechen. Ich habe lange genug Staub gesammelt. Es wird Zeit, neue Welten für die Dynastie zu erobern ... und das Protektorat {mf|seinem rechtmäßigen Besitzer|seiner rechtmäßigen Besitzerin} zu überlassen."
languages.original_text: "Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and set out toward the unknown. I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

traits.locale_text: "Sobald unser Martyrium in diesem dunklen Sektor vorbei ist und Euer Schiff nach Hause zurückkehrt, werde ich einen Chartisten finden, der bereit ist, einen vormals toten Mann an Bord zu nehmen, der immer noch von den Sternen träumt, um in das Unbekannte aufzubrechen. Ich habe lange genug Staub gesammelt. Es wird Zeit, neue Welten für die Dynastie zu erobern ... und das Protektorat {mf|seinem rechtmäßigen Besitzer|seiner rechtmäßigen Besitzerin} zu überlassen."

languages.text: « Une fois nos problèmes dans ce secteur obscur réglés et votre vaisseau de retour chez lui, je trouverai un Cartographe disposé à accepter dans ses rangs le cadavre réanimé d'un homme qui rêve encore des étoiles, et je mettrai le cap sur l'inconnu. Je prends la poussière depuis bien trop longtemps. Il est temps pour moi de conquérir de nouveaux mondes pour la dynastie... et de laisser le protectorat à {mf|son|sa} propriétaire légitime. »
languages.original_text: "Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and set out toward the unknown. I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

traits.locale_text: « Une fois nos problèmes dans ce secteur obscur réglés et votre vaisseau de retour chez lui, je trouverai un Cartographe disposé à accepter dans ses rangs le cadavre réanimé d'un homme qui rêve encore des étoiles, et je mettrai le cap sur l'inconnu. Je prends la poussière depuis bien trop longtemps. Il est temps pour moi de conquérir de nouveaux mondes pour la dynastie... et de laisser le protectorat à {mf|son|sa} propriétaire légitime. »

languages.text: «Cuando nuestro calvario en este sector oscuro haya acabado y su nave vuelva a casa, encontraré a un cartista dispuesto a aceptar a un muerto reanimado que aún sueña con las estrellas y partiré rumbo a lo desconocido. He acumulado demasiado polvo. Es hora de conquistar nuevos mundos para la dinastía... y dejar el protectorado en manos de su legítim{mf|o|a} dueñ{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and set out toward the unknown. I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando nuestro calvario en este sector oscuro haya acabado y su nave vuelva a casa, encontraré a un cartista dispuesto a aceptar a un muerto reanimado que aún sueña con las estrellas y partiré rumbo a lo desconocido. He acumulado demasiado polvo. Es hora de conquistar nuevos mundos para la dinastía... y dejar el protectorado en manos de su legítim{mf|o|a} dueñ{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: "Bu karanlık sektördeki çilelerimiz bittiğinde ve gemin eve döndüğünde, hâlâ yıldızları hayal eden canlanmış bir ölüyü gemisine almayı kabul edecek bir Haritacı bulup bilinmeyene doğru yola çıkacağım. Tozlanarak çok uzun yıllar geçirdim. Hanedanlık için yeni dünyalar fethetme... Ve protektorayı yasal sahibine bırakma zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: "Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and set out toward the unknown. I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

traits.locale_text: "Bu karanlık sektördeki çilelerimiz bittiğinde ve gemin eve döndüğünde, hâlâ yıldızları hayal eden canlanmış bir ölüyü gemisine almayı kabul edecek bir Haritacı bulup bilinmeyene doğru yola çıkacağım. Tozlanarak çok uzun yıllar geçirdim. Hanedanlık için yeni dünyalar fethetme... Ve protektorayı yasal sahibine bırakma zamanı geldi."

languages.text: “等我们在这片黑暗星区的磨难结束，你的舰船驶回故土之后，我会找到一位宪章船长，让他把我这个死而复生、仍怀星海之梦的人带上船，然后再次启程，驶向未知。我已经沉寂太久了。是时候为王朝征服新的世界了……而属地，就交给它真正的主人。”
languages.original_text: "Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and set out toward the unknown. I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

traits.locale_text: “等我们在这片黑暗星区的磨难结束，你的舰船驶回故土之后，我会找到一位宪章船长，让他把我这个死而复生、仍怀星海之梦的人带上船，然后再次启程，驶向未知。我已经沉寂太久了。是时候为王朝征服新的世界了……而属地，就交给它真正的主人。”

languages.text: 「この暗黒の領域での苦難が終わり、貴船が故郷に帰ったら、星を夢見る蘇った死者を乗せる賛同者を見つけ、未知の世界を目指します。私は長すぎる間、埃をかぶって過ごしてきました。王朝のために新しい世界を征服し、そして保護領は正当な所有者に返します。」
languages.original_text: "Once our ordeals in this dark sector are over and your ship returns home, I shall find a Chartist willing to take on board a reanimated dead man who still dreams of the stars, and set out toward the unknown. I have spent too long gathering dust. It is time to conquer new worlds for the dynasty... and leave the protectorate to its rightful owner."

traits.locale_text: 「この暗黒の領域での苦難が終わり、貴船が故郷に帰ったら、星を夢見る蘇った死者を乗せる賛同者を見つけ、未知の世界を目指します。私は長すぎる間、埃をかぶって過ごしてきました。王朝のために新しい世界を征服し、そして保護領は正当な所有者に返します。」
